news_headlines.title: [Form 4] Dell Technologies Inc. Insider Trading Activity

Dell director Egon Durban, Co-CEO of Silver Lake Group, continues to beneficially own 1,252,345 Class C shares directly, plus additional indirect interests.

news_headlines.title: Dell Technologies Inc: Silver Lake Group sells $74.6m in shares
news_headlines.summary: Silver Lake Group and affiliated entities sold $74.6 million worth of Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) Class C Common Stock on March 23, 2026, with share prices ranging from $160.6 to $164.18. This sale occurred as Dell's stock has shown strong performance, currently trading at $176.91, up nearly 10% from the sale prices and 41% year-to-date. Dell has also recently announced product enhancements including quantum-ready security features for PCs, improvements to its AI Data Platform with NVIDIA technologies, and new AI workstations.

Dell also announced security enhancements with quantum-ready features for its commercial PCs, AI Data Platform upgrades incorporating NVIDIA technologies, and new AI workstations.
